title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Blowing snow. Winds gusting as high as 35 mph.

* WHERE...Eastern Alaska Range South of Trims Camp and Southern
Denali Borough.

* WHEN...Until 1 AM AKDT Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Travel could be very difficult. Areas of blowing snow
could reduce visibility to less than a mile at times.
Slow down and use caution while traveling. Visit 511.alaska.gov or

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:

* WHERE...White Mountains and High Terrain South of the Yukon River.

* WHEN...Until 7 AM AKDT Tuesday.
